threads.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS threads (  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, start_time TIMESTAMP, end_time TIMESTAMP, topic TEXT, content TEXT, is_processed BOOLEAN)

msgs.schema: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS msgs (  id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,  thread_id INTEGER, author TEXT NOT NULL, datetime TIMESTAMP, msg TEXT, answers TEXT, type TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (thread_id) REFERENCES conversation_threads(id))
